message:
test(filedescriptor): expand from 64 to 78 tests for file descriptor wrappers (wa-3tf0s)

Add 14 new tests covering: error source() chains (Pipe has source, Dup
has source, IllegalFdValue has no source), OnlySocketsNonBlocking
display, multiple independent pipes, partial pipe reads, FileDescriptor
new from raw fd, as_stdio/as_file for write end, dup write end and
write through both, socketpair both ends non-blocking, poll with two
ready fds, Result type alias usage, and pollfd struct field access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
